entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (65) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID.
MODIFICATION DESCRIPTION: TO INCORPORATE UPDATED CDR LANGUAGE.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (67) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD - SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID.
MODIFICATION DESCRIPTION - THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE FAR CLAUSE 52.232-40 INTO THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (68) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: TO PROVIDE TITLE IV STUDENT LOAN MANAGEMENT AND SERVICING TO SECONDARY EDUCATION STUDENTS. SPECIFIC COMPLIANCE ACTIVITIES FOR SERVICING FEDERALLY HELD ASSETS MAY INCLUDE, BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO: (1) SECURITY; (2) LOAN CONVERSION, (3) FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION; (4) SERVICING; (5) REPORTING; (6) RECORD RETENTION; AND (7) AUDIT RESPONSE SUPPORT."
MODIFICATION: TO INCORPORATE THE REQUIREMENTS AND PRICING FOR THE COHORT DEFAULT RATE (CDR) PILOT AND TO REVISE THE CONTRACT LINE ITEM NUMBERS (CLIN).

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (69) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of -$600,000

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
CRITICAL FUNCTION
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID. TAS CODE: TAS::91 0198::TAS TO PROVIDE TITLE IV STUDENT LOAN MANAGEMENT AND SERVICING TO SECONDARY EDUCATION STUDENTS. SPECIFIC COMPLIANCE ACTIVITIES FOR SERVICING FEDERALLY HELD ASSETS MAY INCLUDE, BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO: (1) SECURITY; (2) LOAN CONVERSION, (3) FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION; (4) SERVICING; (5) REPORTING; (6) RECORD RETENTION; AND (7) AUDIT RESPONSE SUPPORT.
MODIFICATION: DE-OBLIGATE EXCESS FUNDS IN THE AMOUNT OF $600,000.00 FROM CONTRACT NUMBER ED-FSA-09-D-0014.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC EDFSA09D0014 (75) awarded to HIGHER EDUCATION ASSISTANCE AGENCY, PA, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
"CRITICAL FUNCTION"
BASE AWARD: SERVICING OF TITLE IV STUDENT FINANCIAL AID. TAS CODE: TAS::91 0198::TAS TO PROVIDE TITLE IV STUDENT LOAN MANAGEMENT AND SERVICING TO SECONDARY EDUCATION STUDENTS. SPECIFIC COMPLIANCE ACTIVITIES FOR SERVICING FEDERALLY HELD ASSETS MAY INCLUDE, BUT ARE NOT LIMITED TO: (1) SECURITY; (2) LOAN CONVERSION, (3) FINANCIAL RECONCILIATION; (4) SERVICING; (5) REPORTING; (6) RECORD RETENTION; AND (7) AUDIT RESPONSE SUPPORT."
MODIFICATION: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD 168 ADDITIONAL PERSONAL IDENTITY VERIFICATION (PIV) TOKENS AS GOVERNMENT FURNISHED PROPERTY (GFP), IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
